g.title: The classic lever: Pull the lever to open the door
The way out: The classic exit
The level 1 debuffer: An enemy that curses the player The level 2 enemy: A standard enemy that consumes health The level 3 enemy: A standard enemy that consumes health
The dice pattern game: Play a game, win resources, and pay to open the door
The compass puzzle: Sum card numbers at a given direction at given cells
